description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Register for the 10K as a 30–39-year-old runner with a 55-minute goal time, choose a unisex medium race T-shirt, and add the cheapest water bottle under $15 to your registration before paying by credit card.
tasks.name: Register for the 10K as a 30–39-year-old runner with a 55-minute goal time, choose a unisex medium race T-shirt, and add the cheapest water bottle under $15 to your registration before paying by credit card.
tasks.description: Register for the 10K as a 30–39-year-old runner with a 55-minute goal time, choose a unisex medium race T-shirt, and add the cheapest water bottle under $15 to your registration before paying by credit card.

tasks.instruction: Find men’s performance T-shirts, filter to blue color in size M under $30, choose the cheapest matching shirt, and add two of it to your cart.
tasks.name: Find men’s performance T-shirts, filter to blue color in size M under $30, choose the cheapest matching shirt, and add two of it to your cart.
tasks.description: Find men’s performance T-shirts, filter to blue color in size M under $30, choose the cheapest matching shirt, and add two of it to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Register a child for the kids fun run, enter valid child and emergency contact details, then select the earliest available start wave that begins before 10:30 AM.

target_names: Kids Fun Run Wave A (Younger Kids)

tasks.name: Register a child for the kids fun run, enter valid child and emergency contact details, then select the earliest available start wave that begins before 10:30 AM.
tasks.description: Register a child for the kids fun run, enter valid child and emergency contact details, then select the earliest available start wave that begins before 10:30 AM.

tasks.instruction: From the marathon pacer groups, filter to finish times between 3:45 and 4:00 hours and add to your race plan the group whose time is closest to 3:45 without being faster than 3:45.
tasks.name: From the marathon pacer groups, filter to finish times between 3:45 and 4:00 hours and add to your race plan the group whose time is closest to 3:45 without being faster than 3:45.
tasks.description: From the marathon pacer groups, filter to finish times between 3:45 and 4:00 hours and add to your race plan the group whose time is closest to 3:45 without being faster than 3:45.

tasks.instruction: Reserve one shuttle seat from the downtown parking lot C for a departure between 5:30 and 6:00 AM, choosing the option whose time is closest to 5:45 AM.

target_names: Downtown Parking Lot C Shuttle 5:45 AM

tasks.name: Reserve one shuttle seat from the downtown parking lot C for a departure between 5:30 and 6:00 AM, choosing the option whose time is closest to 5:45 AM.
tasks.description: Reserve one shuttle seat from the downtown parking lot C for a departure between 5:30 and 6:00 AM, choosing the option whose time is closest to 5:45 AM.

tasks.instruction: On the main race day, find volunteer opportunities for course support water stations with a shift from 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM and sign up for the first matching listing.
tasks.name: On the main race day, find volunteer opportunities for course support water stations with a shift from 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM and sign up for the first matching listing.
tasks.description: On the main race day, find volunteer opportunities for course support water stations with a shift from 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM and sign up for the first matching listing.

tasks.instruction: Use the training tools to create a 12-week intermediate half-marathon plan starting next Monday and save it to your account.
tasks.name: Use the training tools to create a 12-week intermediate half-marathon plan starting next Monday and save it to your account.
tasks.description: Use the training tools to create a 12-week intermediate half-marathon plan starting next Monday and save it to your account.

tasks.instruction: Without registering for a race, make an anonymous credit card donation between $35 and $45 to the active charity focused on youth sports in the city.
tasks.name: Without registering for a race, make an anonymous credit card donation between $35 and $45 to the active charity focused on youth sports in the city.
tasks.description: Without registering for a race, make an anonymous credit card donation between $35 and $45 to the active charity focused on youth sports in the city.

tasks.instruction: On the hotels page, filter to properties within 3 miles that offer a free race-day shuttle, sort by price per night, compare the first two results, and start a 2-night booking at the cheaper one via the partner link.
tasks.name: On the hotels page, filter to properties within 3 miles that offer a free race-day shuttle, sort by price per night, compare the first two results, and start a 2-night booking at the cheaper one via the partner link.
